name: Quik Cash Jewelry & Pawn Inc
description_short: Family-owned Miami pawn shop since 1987 specializing in jewelry, gold, and collateral-based loans. Offers buying, selling, and pawning services in Liberty City.
description_long:
Quik Cash Jewelry & Pawn is a family-owned and operated pawn shop that has served the Miami community since 1987. Located in the historic Liberty City neighborhood at 7318 NW 7th Ave., the business has built nearly four decades of trust with local customers through consistent, community-focused service. The company positions itself as more than a transactional pawn shop—emphasizing roots in the neighborhood and a commitment to giving back to the community that has supported them.

Quik Cash offers a full range of pawn shop services including buying, selling, and pawning collateral-based items. Their inventory spans fine jewelry, gold, silver, precious stones, tools, electronics, vehicles, collectibles, and antiques. The business accepts items of value as collateral for quick cash loans, a traditional pawn model that provides same-day or rapid funding without credit checks. Customers can also purchase items from their inventory or sell items directly to the shop.

The company distinguishes itself through its family ownership model, long operational history, and emphasis on treating customers with "kindness, fairness, and honesty." They offer appointment-based service for flexible access and maintain bilingual operations (Spanish: "Casa De Empeno"), reflecting their Miami customer base. The business operates with a transparent, personal approach rather than corporate chain practices.

As a pawn shop, Quik Cash serves customers seeking immediate cash without credit qualification but at the cost of forfeiting or risking collateral. The typical pawn model involves high interest rates and strict redemption timelines. The website provides limited detail on loan terms, interest rates, or redemption periods—information essential for consumer decision-making. Hours are limited and primarily by appointment, which may be inconvenient for drop-in customers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Family-owned and operated since 1987 with nearly 40 years of community presence and trust
No credit check required—immediate access to cash for those with collateral
Diverse inventory including jewelry, gold, silver, electronics, tools, vehicles, and collectibles
Bilingual operations serving Miami's Spanish-speaking community
Appointment-based service available for flexibility and after-hours access
Located in Liberty City with commitment to community support and giving back
Transparent, personal approach emphasizing fairness and honesty over corporate chain practices
cons: Website lacks critical pawn terms: no stated interest rates, loan duration, or redemption periods
Limited operating hours (currently closed most days, appointment-only) restricts access
Pawn model requires surrendering collateral—risk of permanent loss if unable to repay
Typical pawn industry rates are high compared to traditional personal loans
Limited online transparency about valuation methods and loan-to-value ratios
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash without credit approval or income verification
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools) willing to use them as collateral
Miami residents familiar with community-based pawn services and the Liberty City neighborhood
Collectors or resellers seeking to buy/sell secondhand jewelry, gold, and collectibles
diagnosis: Quik Cash is best for Miami residents or visitors needing immediate cash who own valuable items (jewelry, gold, electronics, tools) and are willing to pledge them as collateral. The main caveat is that pawn loans typically carry high interest rates, strict redemption deadlines, and risk of losing your collateral—making this suitable only for short-term cash needs, not ongoing credit alternatives.
services: Pawn loans on collateral (jewelry, gold, electronics, tools, vehicles, antiques)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
